arts.ttl: Newcastle United make the most of sacked Man United scouting guru after Dutchman jets in
arts.sum: The Dutchman, who headed Manchester United's scouting system for six years, came on board at Newcastle in late 2023 following his role at Old Trafford, where he worked alongside Louis van Gaal but stayed on after the ex-Barcelona manager's departure. Newcastle United's European scouting supremo Marcel Bout has been on Tyneside to discuss the summer's recruitment plans.

arts.ttl: Kieran Trippier's telling response after learning he'd lost Newcastle United captaincy
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has offered insight into Kieran Trippier's reaction after being told he would not be getting the captain's armband this season. But Howe has praised Trippier's reaction to not being appointed skipper this season with the defender poised to play a part in the FA Cup tie against Brighton & Hove Albion today.

arts.ttl: Lewis Hall lifts lid on Newcastle United ambition blueprint after touching fan message at Anfield
arts.sum: Newcastle United star Lewis Hall has admitted that Toon players were left blown away by the loyalty of Geordie fans at Anfield after the defeat to Liverpool - and the squad are now determined to repay them with a second trip to Wembley this season. That is exactly what is effectively on the table when Brighton & Hove Albion come to St James' Park on FA Cup fifth round weekend with a win over the Seagulls, then leaving Hall and co a potential 90 minutes away from another trip to Wembley in April where the semi-finals will be staged and Newcastle would be handed around 34,000 tickets for a last four showdown beneath the famous arch.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Brighton Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Newcastle and Brighton lock horns this afternoon with a spot in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup up for grabs. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted li...

arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-final draw details confirmed – Brighton, Crystal Palace and Preston ball numbers, how to watch
arts.sum: Brighton travel to Newcastle for the fifth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: What are the words to Blaydon Races? Newcastle United anthem lyrics and history
arts.sum: Matchdays at St. James' Park and following Newcastle United wouldn't be the same without the historic Blaydon Races anthem. Gannin' alang the Scotswood Road, to see the Blaydon Races.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe reacts to Newcastle vs Brighton FA Cup rule change amid Bournemouth and Wolves confusion
arts.sum: Brighton travel to Newcastle for an FA Cup fifth round tie

arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali opens up on gambling addiction and Newcastle United support
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali has revealed he visited a factory on Tyneside that helped him change his perspective on gambling following his ban from football. "In the first two months I was detached from everyone, then returning to life, training every day without having the match, I realised that I was paying for what I had done," he told La Repubblica .

arts.ttl: Isak fear, Pope axed, Barnes chance - Newcastle United starting XI decision
arts.sum: Starting XI : Dubravka, Trippier, Krafth, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Miley, Longstaff; Osula, Wilson, Barnes. Starting XI : Pope, Livramento, Krafth, Burn, Hall; Miley, Tonali, Willock; Osula, Wilson, Barnes

arts.ttl: Tottenham to be involved in ‘tug of war’ with Newcastle and Aston Villa for PL midfielder
arts.sum: Champions League chasing clubs Tottenham, Newcastle United and Aston Villa are all looking to strengthen their midfield in the summer transfer window. They have struggled in the Premier League this season but they are ready to invest in the summer to challenge for a place in the Champions League next season.
